flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Midwestern Baptist Theological Seminary rose 72% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.4k → $5.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Midwestern Baptist Theological Seminary rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.4k → $10.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Midwestern Baptist Theological Seminary fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (872 → 747).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Midwestern Baptist Theological Seminary rose 88% between 2021 and 2024 (12.1% → 22.7%).
